MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

*** After hearing, the Court vacates its ruling and takes the matter off calendar per email received from plaintiff that the matter has settled. Plaintiff will file a notice of settlement or dismissal. ***
